reason: Review must verify renamed files, script entrypoints, SQL helpers, and tests still match the documented backend layout after board/moderator removal.
Review must verify schema/auth/RLS changes still honor database contracts while removing moderator-only paths and renaming board to category.
Review against required regression coverage and against forbidden drift like inline privileged SQL or stale contract text.
Review error strings and policy-violation behavior where admin/moderator flows are removed or renamed so docs/tests stay consistent.
Review cross-layer consistency so renamed identifiers and deleted moderation flows do not leave mismatched contracts between SQL, scripts, docs, and tests.
